title: School begins
description: Uncle Sam sternly instructs students stereotypically representing territories acquired after the Spanish-American War, with stereotypical depictions of Black Americans, Indigenous Americans, and Chinese immigrants in the background and "well-behaved" predominantly White students in the rightmost foreground.
creator: Dalrymple, Louis

title: Uncle Sam's picnic
description: Uncle Sam reaches out towards children representing the Philippines, Puerto Rico, Cuba, and the Ladrones from a wagon pulled by horses named "Liberty" and "Union" as a man representing the Monroe Doctrine looks on.
creator: Dalrymple, Louis

title: The white man's burden
description: John Bull and Uncle Sam carry stereotypical representations of their territorial subjects in baskets on their backs up a rocky hill labeled "barbarism, superstition, slavery, vice, and brutality" towards civilization, represented as a divine throne
creator: Gillam, Victor

title: A trifle embarrassed
description: Uncle Sam and Lady Columbia look embarrasingly on a basket full of children labeled "Puerto Rico, Cuba, Hawaii, and Philippine" being handed to them as children labeled "Texas, New Mexico, Alaska, and California" dance in a circle behind walls labeled "US Founding Asylum"
creator: Keppler, Udo

title: A valuable addition to the repast
description: Uncle Sam dines at "The Expansion Restaurant" with a table full of foods labeled for various claimed territories
creator: Bartholomew, Charles
